Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Violet Light]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The Violet Light is an entity that communicates with Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The Violet Light corrects the balance of the world by banishing things back to their home Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Violet Light is a type of light within Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Violet Light is a type of light Alin hears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Violet Light can be used as sheets to banish objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Violet Light asks Alin questions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Violet Light can fall like a luminescent blanket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Violet Light provides ruthless honesty and can show a person their own appearance in a mirror-like way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Violet Light told Alin he lost control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Violet Light can be summoned by Alin's cry.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
